title: [DATA-ENG] DB historique tennis+foot via datasets gratuits — Sackmann GitHub + alternatives CC commercial
description:
Mission build DB historique tennis + foot via datasets GitHub gratuits (alternative ETL API-Football + ESPN qui souffrent quota / coverage limites).

SOURCES PROPOSEES + STATUT LEGAL:

TENNIS:
1) Sackmann tennis_atp (https://github.com/JeffSackmann/tennis_atp)
   - Coverage: ATP 1968+ matches, players, rankings, Elo
   - Format: CSV par saison (atp_matches_YYYY.csv)
   - License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 — ⚠️ NC = NON-COMMERCIAL
   - Impact PariScore: Pro tier €19/mo = commercial → INCOMPATIBLE par defaut
   - Mitigation: contact Sackmann pour licence commerciale OU separate
     usage gratuit only

2) Sackmann tennis_wta (https://github.com/JeffSackmann/tennis_wta)
   - Coverage: WTA equivalent ATP repo
   - Memes contraintes legales

3) Tennis Abstract GitHub (https://github.com/JeffSackmann/tennisabstract.com)
   - Idem NC license

4) Wikidata SPARQL — CC0 commercial OK
   - Query: SELECT match data via tennis tournaments
   - Limites: coverage variable, structure SPARQL complexe
   - Effort: 1-2 jours apprentissage SPARQL

5) ITF/ATP/WTA officials — pas open data

FOOT:
1) openfootball/football.json (https://github.com/openfootball/football.json)
   - Coverage: Big5 European leagues + UCL, depuis 2014
   - Format: JSON par saison + ligue
   - License: ODbL ou Public Domain (commercial OK)
   - Fixtures + scores + classements
   - DEJA evalue dans bd 9je sourcing rapport

2) Wikidata SPARQL pour foot CC0 commercial OK
3) StatsBomb open data (https://github.com/statsbomb/open-data)
   - Coverage: World Cup, Champions League finals, NWSL, etc.
   - Stats avancees (xG, expected threat, events)
   - License: User Agreement (research/educational — commercial nuance)
4) Football.db (https://www.football-db.com/) — license unclear, eval needed

STRATEGIE LEGALE RECOMMANDEE:

Option A — Pure CC0/Public Domain (safe):
- Wikidata SPARQL foot + tennis
- openfootball/football.json foot
- Limites: coverage moins riche que Sackmann, queries SPARQL complexes

Option B — Sackmann freemium split:
- Free tier PariScore: utilise Sackmann (CC BY-NC-SA, attribution requise)
- Pro tier €19/mo: alternative source ou attribution clear
- ⚠️ Risque juridique si Sackmann data en cache server commercial

Option C — Achat licence Sackmann commercial:
- Contact Jeff Sackmann via GitHub/Twitter
- Negocier commercial license (precedent: certaines startups data sports ont ce deal)
- Cost: variable

Option D — Mix (recommendée):
- openfootball + Wikidata (CC0 commercial OK) = base safe
- ESPN public (deja v10.74 + bd rxh) = renforcement
- Sackmann SI licence commercial obtenue OU si segregated free tier
- API-Football Pro quota = primaire pour current/recent season

SCOPE TECHNIQUE:

Phase 1 (3-5j) — Datasets CC0 commercial:
- providers/dataset_openfootball.js: clone repo + parse + transform shape
- providers/dataset_wikidata.js: SPARQL queries tennis/foot historique
- providers/dataset_statsbomb.js: opt-in pour stats avancees (research clause)
- Integration loadHistory() merge pattern v12.26

Phase 2 (1-2j) — Eval Sackmann legal:
- Contact Sackmann commercial licensing
- Si refus → segregated free tier UI + flag clear
- Si OK → providers/dataset_sackmann.js + ingestion

Phase 3 (1j) — Integration frontend:
- Filter sport+season + lazy-loading Historique tab
- Badge 'Source: <provider>' (transparency)

EFFORT TOTAL: 5-8 jours dev / 3 phases

LIVRABLES:
- 3-4 providers dataset clients
- Documentation .context/dataset_licensing_audit.md (legal review)
- historique_*.json output unified
- UI Historique tab consume new sources

PRIORISATION P0:
- Debloque ETL bloque (quota API-Football epuise)
- Couverture historique massive (1968+ tennis Sackmann, 2014+ foot openfootball)
- Differentiation marketing fort
- Cost: zero (vs 0-100/mo API-Football tier sup)

⚠️ LEGAL FLAG: bd ferme b3s precedent montre scraping = risque legal. Datasets formals + license clear = safer mais Sackmann NC reste a clarifier.

title: [SPIKE/SCRAPE] Multi-source scrapers — TennisDB + TennisStats + DataMB + FootballDatabase (alternative API-Football quota)
description:
Mission scraping 4 sources alternatives au ETL API-Football (bd 9je quota epuise + bd rxh tennis ESPN deja en place).

SOURCES EVALUEES:

1) TennisDB (https://tennis-db.com/)
   - Couverture: ATP 1968→2026 + WTA (sub-path /wta/)
   - Data: rankings, matches, players, tournaments, Elo, H2H
   - Acces: web scraping uniquement, pas d'API publique
   - ToS: /terms (a verifier — copyright 2026 TennisDB)
   - Note: 'Not affiliated with the ATP'

2) TennisStats (https://tennisstats.com/)
   - Couverture: 25k+ joueurs, 28k+ competitions ATP/WTA
   - Data: rankings, H2H, live scores, aces stats, double faults, surface stats
   - Acces: scraping (pas API publique mentionnee)
   - ToS: 'not advice, reference only, trademarks belong to owners'
   - P Time backend ~26ms = fast server-side

3) DataMB (https://datamb.football/?lang=fr)
   - Couverture: PL 20 + La Liga 20 + Bundesliga 18 + Serie A 20 + L1 18 + Eredivisie 18 + Liga PT 18
   - Data: comparaisons joueurs, radars, stats equipes
   - Acces: section Pro payante (monetization) + free
   - Note: pas xG explicite homepage

4) FootballDatabase (https://www.footballdatabase.eu/fr/)
   - Couverture: 'depuis l'origine du foot a aujourd'hui'
   - Data: players, transferts, matches, clubs, live updates, ratings users
   - Ligues: Ligue 1, PL, Liga, etc. (multi)
   - Acces: scraping, pas API explicite
   - ToS: /fr/termsandconditions (a verifier)
   - Community model (user contributions ratings)

PRIORISATION P0 (Lead PM stratégique):
- Bloque actuellement: ETL Foot (9je) bloque par quota API-Football → cette spike DEBLOQUE
- Tennis ETL (rxh) deja en place avec ESPN gratuit → moins urgent mais TennisDB/TennisStats apportent stats Elo historique
- Impact: tab Historique massif data sans coût API supplementaire
- Valeur: differentiation vs concurrents (couverture 1968+ tennis, mass foot)

SCOPE TECHNIQUE:
1. Audit ToS de chaque source (legal, pas de prohibition explicite scraping)
2. Test scraping faisabilite:
   - Node https natif + headers User-Agent ?
   - Cloudflare wall ? → curl JA3-spoof (deja exploite v10.66 AiScore)
   - Playwright stealth si CF dur ?
3. Identifier endpoints/URLs structuredness:
   - JSON exposes via XHR ?
   - HTML parsing required ?
   - Rate limiting (request throttle / IP ban) ?
4. Implementer scrapers modulaires:
   - providers/scrape_tennisdb.js
   - providers/scrape_tennisstats.js
   - providers/scrape_datamb.js
   - providers/scrape_footballdatabase.js
5. Cache layer: TTL 24h pour donnees historiques (les matches passes ne changent pas)
6. Output unified shape compatible historique_football.json + historique_tennis.json existant
7. Integrate dans loadHistory() pattern v12.26 → backend merge automatique

LIVRABLES:
- 4 scrapers Node.js (modulaires)
- ToS compliance audit per source
- Test E2E sample extraction (5 matches par source)
- Documentation .context/scrape_multi_source.md

EFFORT: ~4-6 jours dev / 5 phases (audit + scraping + cache + integration + tests)

PREREQUIS: aucun bloqueur immediat. ETL existants (9je, rxh) restent en place comme primary, scrapers en fallback/enrichment.

DEBLOQUE: ETL prod ingestion immediate sans quota API-Football (le bloqueur today).
notes:
Phase 1 audit ToS livré 21/05/2026. BILAN DEFAVORABLE:

TennisDB: 'Automated bulk data extraction not permitted without prior written consent' + CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 underlying Sackmann (NC = incompatible PariScore Pro commercial)
TennisStats: tres strict 'data mining, robots, scraper' + 'commercial use' prohibe explicit
DataMB: zone grise — privacy policy clean mais ToS dedié pas verifie
FootballDatabase: pas robots/scraping explicit MAIS CPI français 'extraction substantielle base donnees + commercial' interdits

DECISION PIVOT:
- 2/4 sources REJET legal explicit
- 2/4 sources zone grise + CPI risque
- ROI scraping vs legal risk = defavorable

ALTERNATIVES LEGALES PROPRES retenues:
1. openfootball/football.json GitHub (CC commercial OK) — foot historique  
2. Wikidata SPARQL CC0 — match data foot+tennis
3. ESPN public deja en place (rxh tennis OK)
4. API-Football Pro deja paye — attendre quota reset (tomorrow)
5. Sackmann GitHub datasets — eval juridique NC license vs business model PariScore Pro

Bd ferme. Focus 9je foot + rxh tennis + (optionnel) eval Sackmann license.

title: [DATA-ENG] Pipeline ETL Historique Tennis — saisons 2024/2025/2026 (parallel a 9je foot)
description:
Mission analogue a bd ParisScorebis-9je mais pour TENNIS. Onglet Historique doit contenir matchs ATP/WTA archives saisons 2024+2025+2026.

SCOPE TENNIS ETL:

SOURCING STRATEGY:
✓ Source primaire: ESPN tennis public endpoints (deja integre v10.74) — scoreboard + match results
✓ Source secondaire: BSD tennis (deja sub paye $5/mo) — historical events
✓ Source tertiaire: Tennis Abstract (Sackmann Elo + match results CSV public domain GitHub)
✗ Skip aiscore.com (scraping CF, focus live uniquement)
✗ Skip RapidAPI tennis (cost variable, eval first)

ARCHITECTURE:
- Nouveau script seed_historique_tennis.js (analogue a seed_historique_db.js foot)
- Output: historique_tennis.json schema:
  { schema_version, generated_at,
    seasons: { 2024: { atp: { tournaments: [...] }, wta: {...} }, 2025: {...}, 2026: {...} } }
- Backend server.js: load au boot via loadHistory (extension v12.26 pattern)
  → push dans db.archive_matches avec sport='tennis'
- Frontend Historique tab: filtre 'Tennis' active → afficher matchs
  → existing runHistoryQuery support sport filter

PRIORITES TOURNOIS:
- Grand Slams (4 × 3 saisons = 12 tournois × ~127 matchs = ~1500 matches)
- ATP 1000 (~9 events × 3 saisons × ~96 matches = ~2600)
- ATP/WTA 500 (~14 × 3 × ~48 = ~2000)
- ATP/WTA 250 + Challenger 125 + ITF (volume large, optionnel)

Total estimation: ~6000-10000 matchs tennis 3 saisons (foot ~3500/saison × 9 ligues × 3 = ~95k)

STATS TENNIS RECHERCHEES:
- Score sets + tiebreaks
- Aces, double faults, 1st serve %, points won
- Break points won/saved
- Total winners + unforced errors
- Surface (clay/grass/hard/carpet)
- Round (R128/R64/R32/R16/QF/SF/F)
- Player stats: country, rank at time of match

ROADMAP:
1. Phase 1: ESPN scoreboard scrape saison 2024 GS (4 tournois) — validation
2. Phase 2: BSD tennis historical events 2024-2026 toutes catégories
3. Phase 3: Tennis Abstract CSV import (player ELO snapshots)
4. Phase 4: Backend loadHistory extension tennis
5. Phase 5: Frontend Historique tab tennis filter UI

PREREQUIS:
- bd 9je foot ETL livrable (architecture pattern reutilisable)
- Tennis Abstract scraper (bd ParisScorebis-h6a deja P3 ouvert)

EFFORT: 4-6 jours dev / 5 phases

LIVRABLES:
- seed_historique_tennis.js
- historique_tennis.json schema
- Backend loadHistory extension tennis
- Frontend filter UI sport='tennis'

title: [DATA-ENG] Pipeline ETL massif Historique Football — seed DB historique (FBref/API/dataset)
description:
Mission Lead Data Engineer. Construire Data Warehouse historique football pour alimenter onglet Historique.

CARTE BLANCHE outils MCP: python-data-pipeline, database-architect, web-scraper-advanced, mcp-browser-automation (Playwright/Puppeteer), api-integration.

ETAPE 1 — STRATEGIE SOURCING
A) Option Scraper:
   - fbref.com / soccerstats.com via headless browser
   - Bypass Cloudflare: rotation user-agents, JA3-spoof, Playwright stealth
   - Risque: ToS + maintenance
B) Option API/Datasets:
   - football-data.org free tier
   - Kaggle datasets (historical matches)
   - GitHub openfootball/football.json
   - API-Football tier Pro deja paye (deja en place)
C) Trade-off Quantite × Fiabilite × Cout × Maintenance

Decision strategique: prioriser datasets/API vs scraping pour fondation, scraping pour gap fill.

ETAPE 2 — ARCHITECTURE DB + ETL
- Script seed_historique_db.js (ou .py si stack Python plus efficient)
- Extract data brute (matches finis, scores, stats, xG, cotes)
- Transform: nettoyage, normalisation noms equipes (normName helper), dedup
- Load: format historique_football.json OU SQLite pariscore_history.db
- Compatible logique frontend pariscore.html existante
- Idempotent: re-runs sans doublons

ETAPE 3 — CONNEXION FRONTEND
- Modifier controller/script pour charger nouvelle data warehouse
- Filtres existants (championnat/date/strategie) tapent dans nouvelle DB
- Lazy-loading / pagination (limite ~50 matches/page) — eviter crash DOM sur 10k+ matches
- Skeleton states pendant chargement chunks

ETAPE 4 — EXECUTION + REPORTING
1. Strategie + script ingestion
2. Echantillon validation: 1 saison complete Premier League OR Ligue 1
3. Rapport terminal:
   - Source data choisie (winning approach)
   - Schema DB structure
   - Volume data ingere
   - Performance frontend avec nouvelle data
4. Commit Git pipeline une fois integration validee

ESTIMATION: ~3-5 jours dev (scraping/ingestion ~2j, schema+ETL ~1j, frontend integration ~1-2j)

PREREQUIS: aucun bloqueur immediat. Doit interagir avec onglet Historique deja existant (#page-historique avec .dh-* classes, migre V2 v12.2).
notes: v12.26+ code livré (seed_historique_db.js + transformFixture). RUN BLOQUÉ quota API-Football épuisé. Attendre reset minuit UTC puis bash .context/run_etl_2024_2026.sh.

title: Tennis BUG: Erreur de chargement value-bets + retrait annotation sous-titre

notes: v12.x — Fix verifie en place: (1) gate status-aware ligne 15479 avec message Pro Tennis colspan=19 + retry timer 2.5s (line 15494, 15518), (2) SWR cache globalThis singleton lines 22162-22175 (_tnsVBState + _tnEnrichSnap), (3) janitor flag globalThis.__tnSnapJanitorOn ligne 22257 evite double-startup, (4) bridge globalThis.__tnWarmers ligne 14828 pour resolution scope warmers. title: [DATA-ENG/SCRAPE] elofootball.com Elo historique massif — 1M games depuis 1955
description:
Mission ETL via https://elofootball.com — Elo ratings europeens football. Audit POSITIF.

AUDIT 21/05/2026:

COVERAGE EXCEPTIONNELLE:
- 1+ MILLION matchs historiques depuis 1955
- 3708 clubs europeens
- 59 pays
- 277 competitions (ligues + coupes + competitions UEFA)
- Live rankings 2025-2026 ongoing
- Match previews + resultats historiques
- Methodologie Elo documented (blog resources)

LEGAL:
- robots.txt → 404 (no restrictions formal)
- ToS → pas visible homepage (zone grise mais owner clearly community-friendly)
- Donations PayPal = projet communautaire indépendant
- Aucun bot banlist explicit
- Aucune mention 'commercial use prohibited' visible

VERDICT: Zone grise legale FAVORABLE (vs footballdatabase ban explicit, Sackmann NC strict, FBref ToS commercial interdit)
- Scraping techniquement permis (no robots.txt)
- Projet communautaire → attribution + politesse = ethique
- Aucune restriction explicite trouvee

ACCES TECHNIQUE:
- Pas d'API publique mentionnee
- Pas de CSV/JSON download direct
- Interactive web tables → scraping HTML parsing (Cheerio Node.js)
- Pages structurees par club/competition/saison

SCOPE TECHNIQUE:

Phase 1 — Scraper scaffold (2-3j):
- seed_historique_elofootball.js
- httpsGet politesse rate-limit 1 req/2-3s
- User-Agent identifiable 'PariScore-ETL/1.0 (+https://pariscore.fr; community-data-aggregator)'
- Endpoint patterns a identifier:
  · /general/rank-clubs-yyyy.html (rankings annuels)
  · /<country>/<club>/<season>/ (results clubs)
  · /<competition>/<season>/ (resultats competitions)
- Parser Cheerio HTML tables → JSON structure

Phase 2 — Coverage prioritaire (1-2j):
- Top 100 clubs Elo current ranking
- 5 saisons recentes 2020-2025
- Competitions: Big5 ligues + UCL/UEL

Phase 3 — Integration backend (1j):
- providers/elofootball_scraper.js
- loadHistory() merge pattern v12.26+
- Marker _source='etl-elofootball', _attribution requise
- Elo rating field important: peut renforcer PariScore Elo blended model

Phase 4 — Verifications (1j):
- Sample 10 clubs × 5 saisons → ~3000 matchs validation
- Comparer cotes Elo vs PariScore Elo interne (calibration)
- Si match → integration prod

EFFORT TOTAL: 5-7j dev / 4 phases

PRIORITE P1 (rationale):
- Coverage UNIQUE: 1M matchs historiques 1955+ (aucune autre source CC0/PD ne couvre cela)
- Elo ratings calcules expert (renforcent PariScore Elo blended)
- Risque legal faible (no robots, no ToS commercial restriction)
- Cost zero (scraping respectueux + attribution)
- Differentiation marketing forte

PREREQUIS:
- npm install cheerio (parser HTML)
- Contact email owner si possible (etiquette) — anders@elofootball.com (a verifier)

LIVRABLES:
- seed_historique_elofootball.js (~300 lignes)
- providers/elofootball_scraper.js (module reutilisable)
- Documentation .context/elofootball_etl_audit.md
- _attribution clear dans data

⚠️ ETIQUETTE OBLIGATOIRE:
- User-Agent identifiable + contact email
- Rate-limit min 2s/req (no spam)
- Cache 30j+ pour matchs historiques (no re-fetch)
- Footer UI Historique tab: 'Source: elofootball.com (community data, Elo ratings)'
- Si owner contact + demande arret: respect immediate
notes: v12.32 Phase 2 livree: parser calibre + Top 50/recent_matches/clubid endpoints fonctionnels. 1902 matchs recents ingested (100% prob+score). Quirk Accept header documente. Reste: Phase 3 integration loadHistory + Phase 4 validation 10 clubs × 5 saisons.

title: [SEO] Fix Google Search Console 'Bloquée par robots.txt'
description:
Email GSC 21/05/2026: pages bloquees par robots.txt. Investigation:

ROOT CAUSE:
- robots.txt (dynamique server.js:26186) avait Disallow /*?match= legacy (vieux format URL avant migration vers /pronostic-team1-vs-team2-id)
- Pas de Allow explicite pour /pronostic-*, /guide/*, /pronostics → Google avait pu interpreter mal
- Manque entries defense-in-depth sur fichiers sensibles (server.js, .env, etc.) — completait BLOCKED_FILES code-side

FIX v12.22 server.js:
- Retire 'Disallow: /*?match=' (legacy obsolete)
- Ajoute 'Allow: /pronostic-*', '/pronostics', '/pronostics/*', '/guide/*', '/guides'
- Ajoute Disallow defense-in-depth: /server.js, /.env, /database.json, /history.json, /pariscore.db, /CLAUDE.md, /CHANGELOG.md
- Ajoute 'Disallow: /r/' (affiliate redirect) + '/cb/' (postback)
- Ajoute 'Crawl-delay: 1' politesse

POST-DEPLOY:
1. Push commit v12.22 + deploy VPS
2. Tester curl https://pariscore.fr/robots.txt → verifier nouveau contenu
3. Google Search Console → URL Inspection → re-tester URL bloquee
4. Demander re-indexation pages prioritaires manuellement
5. Re-soumettre sitemap.xml dans GSC
6. Suivre indexation 2-7 jours

LIVRE: commit v12.22 sera pousse. OPS deploy VPS attendu DG.

Ticket closable apres confirmation re-indexation GSC.

description:

4. Front: filter-console section Pays/Continent (lignes ~8368-8393 pariscore.html) — verifier output bouton Arabie Saoudite vs Conmebol.

- Filtre Pays: clic 'Arabie Saoudite' → liste contient Copa Libertadores (bug)

Fix probable:

- Verifier autres erreurs de mapping (Copa Sudamericana, Recopa, etc.)

title: [BUG/DATA] Tennis: serveur invisible quand source ESPN/LiveScore ou BSD sans is_serving_p1
description:
Code wiring balle 3D (v11.3) verifie OK: symbol i3d-tennisball + render ballCell + CSS .tn-sb-ball + animation tnSrvPulse + render live table _ballSvg = tout cable. Test preview 4 cas (serving=1/2/null/0): 2 balles affichees, 6 off-slots invisibles, code 100% correct.

PROBLEME DATA-SIDE: balle invisible quand m._live.serving == null|0. Sources concernees:
- ESPN scoreboard (server.js:14473): serving:null hardcode, pas dans payload public
- LiveScore fallback (server.js livescore norm): serving:0 hardcode, endpoint expose pas serveur
- BSD live (server.js:14588): null si is_serving_p1 undefined pour le match

FIXES POSSIBLES:
1. Inference par parite des jeux: jeu impair = serveur initial, jeu pair = autre. Necessite initial_server (toss). Best-effort, marche en best-of-3 sans break of serve count.
2. Display badge '?' gris au lieu de slot invisible quand serving inconnu (UX honnetete).
3. Scraping ESPN advanced stats / API-Football pour completer serving (cout: appel supplementaire).
4. AiScore tennis (v10.66 deja scrappe) peut exposer serving - verifier _aiscoreParseMatch.

Decision livrable: fix 1+2 combine. Inference + badge '?' fallback. Cost: backend pur, zero appel API.
notes: v11.4 partiel : FIX A frontend badge '?' livre (.tn-sb-srv-unknown dashed slate + tooltip explicatif). FIX B AiScore parse servePos livre (out.serving 1|2|null derive) MAIS pas propage vers _live shape utilise par scoreboard principal (BSD prioritaire). Restes: 1) cross-source serving sync (merge AiScore.serving dans BSD _live quand BSD null), 2) parity inference avec initial_server.

Mission audit ETL via https://footballdatabase.com/ (different de footballdatabase.eu fermee bd b3s pour CPI French).

AUDIT 21/05/2026:

robots.txt analyse:
- AI bots BANNED EXPLICIT: Amazonbot, Applebot-Extended, Bytespider, CCBot, ClaudeBot, CloudflareBrowserRenderingCrawler, Google-Extended, GPTBot, meta-externalagent
- Mediapartners-Google: aucune restriction (Google AdSense whitelist)
- Tous autres user-agents: SEULEMENT /search/ disallow
- → scraping data pages techniquement OK per robots.txt pour PariScore user-agent custom

Homepage: HTTP 403 (Cloudflare wall confirmed)

INTERPRETATION:
- Owner clairement bot-hostile (banlist AI explicit)
- MAIS legalement, scraping non interdit pour user-agents non-listed dans Disallow
- CF wall = bypass technique requis (JA3-spoof, Playwright stealth)
- ToS dedie a verifier (CF block homepage)

COMPARAISON sister-site footballdatabase.eu (bd b3s closed):
- .eu: CPI French restriction commercial + database extraction = REJET
- .com: bot-hostile mais robots.txt plus permissif pour browsers
- Probable meme owner / company → ToS .com likely similar restrictions
- BUT robots.txt suggere owner accept human-like browsing

OPTIONS:

A — Skip (Recommended Safe):
- AI bot banlist explicit = signal clear owner hostility
- CF bypass effort + risque legal eventual ToS commercial restriction
- Alternatives existent (openfootball v12.29 ODbL, Wikidata CC0 todo, ESPN tennis rxh)

B — Scrape via JA3-spoof curl + custom User-Agent:
- Pattern aiscore v10.66 deja eprouve
- Risque: detected → IP ban
- Effort: 2-3j (scraper + CF bypass + cache)
- Mitigation: rate-limit politesse + identifiable User-Agent
- ⚠️ ToS .com a verifier AVANT impl (require CF bypass pour homepage access)

C — Playwright stealth (heavier):
- Headless Chrome avec stealth plugins
- Plus reliable que curl JA3 sur CF strict
- Cost CPU/RAM serveur + Chromium install
- Effort: 3-5j

D — Contact owner direct:
- Email contact@footballdatabase.com (si listed)
- Demander permission scraping ou API access
- Probable refus (banlist AI suggere position fermee)

VERDICT P2:
- Pas urgent (alternatives livrees)
- ROI defavorable vs effort CF bypass
- Risque legal eventual ToS

SCOPE TECHNIQUE (si Option B GO apres ToS check):
1. Verifier ToS via curl JA3-spoof homepage
2. Scraper Node.js + curl child process pour CF bypass (pattern aiscore)
3. Parser HTML structuré (Cheerio)
4. Rate-limit politeness 1 req/2-5s
5. Cache local 24h matchs passés
6. Output JSON compat loadHistory v12.26+
7. Marker _source='etl-footballdb-com' + _attribution

EFFORT: 3-5j si CF franchi + ToS OK

RECOMMANDATION FINALE: skip + focus alternatives livrees + Wikidata Phase 2 bd 6du6.

title: [SPIKE/ETL] FBref via soccerdata Python library — eval legal+technique
description:
Mission eval ETL via soccerdata Python library (https://soccerdata.readthedocs.io) wrapping FBref + ESPN + Understat + WhoScored.

SITUATION:
- FBref CF wall confirme (v10.72 + robots.txt 403)
- FBref ToS Sports Reference: interdit scraping commercial explicit
- soccerdata library: Python wrapper qui gere CF bypass + cache local
- License soccerdata: MIT (PyPI public)

QUESTION CENTRALE: utiliser soccerdata library = scraper indirectement FBref.
La library est legale en soi (MIT), mais data extracted reste sous ToS Sports Reference.

COVERAGE soccerdata-FBref:
- Stats saisonnieres equipes (tirs, buts, possession)
- Stats matchs par equipe
- Stats saisonnieres + match joueurs
- Calendriers + resultats
- Compositions equipes
- Evenements match (buts, cartons, remplacements)
- xG, advanced stats type Opta

COUVERTURE = SUPERIEURE openfootball (~4x stats avancees)

OPTIONS:

OPTION A — Skip FBref legalement:
- Sports Reference ToS interdit clairement scraping commercial
- soccerdata = simple wrapper, ne change pas reality legale
- Risque DMCA/cease & desist si scale prod
- VERDICT: REJET PariScore commercial

OPTION B — soccerdata via Python sidecar (research only):
- Spawn Python child process pour ETL
- Mark data 'research/educational use only'
- Restrict utilisation interne (debug/improvement modele predictif)
- NOT expose dans UI publique (compliance ToS)
- Effort: 2-3j (sidecar Python + ETL pipeline + cache local)

OPTION C — Negotier license FBref:
- Sports Reference offre 'data partner' tier paid
- Contact: data@sports-reference.com
- Cost: variable (00-5000/mo selon scale)
- VERDICT: hors budget PariScore actuel

OPTION D — Equivalents CC0/PD alternatives:
- Wikidata SPARQL (deja propose bd 6du6 Phase 2)
- Football-data.org free tier (5 ligues, 10 req/min)
- openfootball/football.json (deja livre v12.29)
- StatsBomb open-data (research clause)

RECOMMANDATION LEAD PM:
- ✗ Skip FBref direct scraping (legal risk)
- ✗ Skip soccerdata pour UI publique (transit risk)
- ⚠️ soccerdata OK pour debug interne modele predictif (back-end only, marquage explicit research)
- ✓ Focus alternatives bd 6du6 Phase 2 Wikidata + Phase 3 Sackmann license

SCOPE TECHNIQUE (si Option B retenue):
1. Python venv + soccerdata install (pip install soccerdata)
2. Sidecar Node.js spawn Python child:
   const { spawn } = require('child_process');
   spawn('python3', ['scripts/fbref_extract.py', ...args])
3. Cache local ~/soccerdata/data/ (configurable)
4. ETL specifique: 1 saison × 5 ligues = ~5 min Python run
5. JSON output → loadHistory merge pattern (research_only flag)
6. UI: NE PAS afficher cette data au front (private debug only)

EFFORT Option B: 3-5j dev / 5 phases

DECISION DG ATTENDUE:
1. Skip FBref entierement (Option A — recommande safe)
2. Implementer Option B research-only sidecar Python
3. Tenter Option C contact data@sports-reference.com pour partnership

LIEN bd related:
- bd 6du6 (datasets historique tennis+foot)
- bd b3s (CLOSED — 4 sources scraping audit defavorable)
- bd nyg (Apify Transfermarkt sidecar precedent pattern)

title: [QA/ps-test] Test exhaustif champs cotes apres integration oddsapi
description:
Mission QA test via skill /ps-test (PariScore-specific QA audit framework).

PREREQUIS:
- bd ParisScorebis-qkx (eval RapidAPI odds-api1) → done positif
- bd ParisScorebis-x9s (integration tous champs oddsapi) → done livraison
- Code deploye VPS + restart server

SCOPE TEST /ps-test:
1. Null safety:
   - Champ cote present quand provider renvoie null/error
   - UI fallback cote equitable correct (badge 'COTE THEORIQUE')
   - Pas de NaN/Infinity dans calculs EV/IC90 sur edge cases provider
2. Server/Frontend sync:
   - JSON shape coherent entre /api/v1/matches + /api/v1/tennis/board
   - Champ 'source' provider propage (badge UI Insights modal)
   - Cache TTL respecte par provider
3. Route validation:
   - /api/v1/matches inclut best_edge.ic90 + fav_winrate + odds_delta + cote provider
   - /api/v1/tennis/board inclut best_ev_model + predictive + market_odds
   - 401/403 gates respectes (Pro Tennis / Duo)
   - 503 si TOUS providers down
4. UX states:
   - Loading skeleton pendant fetch
   - Error message clair si provider failure
   - Badge source visible (Odds API / API-Football / odds-api1 / Polymarket / equitable)
   - Hover tooltips coherent
5. Data integrity:
   - Cotes coherent entre providers (Bayesian check: si Odds API 1.80 + odds-api1 1.85 + Polymarket 1.82 → OK; si divergence > 30% → flag)
   - Best_edge calcule sur le BON provider (le plus haut)
   - Pas de double-comptage si meme bookmaker reapparait via 2 providers

OUTPUT: .context/test-report-oddsapi-integration.md selon template /ps-test:
- Severite Critique/Mineur/Cosmetique
- Reproduction steps
- Expected vs Actual
- Fix recommandation

EFFORT: 1-2j test (depend coverage x9s).

Bloque tant que x9s pas done.

Pattern bug Live Detail Modal — quand grid wrapper utilise display:grid+overflow:hidden+min-height:0 dans flex parent #live-detail-inner (flex:1;min-height:0), height calculée=0 et contenu clippé invisible. Symptôme: utilisateur ne voit pas stats live (10 bars + 14 text rows) malgré que renderStatRow popule correctement. Diagnostic: getBoundingClientRect() sur grid retourne h=0 mais container interne h=974. Fix: drop overflow:hidden + min-height:0 du wrapper et overflow-y:auto des colonnes. Laisser outer #live-detail-inner gérer scroll vertical. Fichier pariscore.html ~line 7182-7193. Commit 9353295.

TV channel resolution bug pattern (server.js:10162 + pariscore.html:9447): 4 bugs cascadés ont caché J1 League logo DAZN Japan. (1) apiCacheSet 4eme arg ttlMs ignoré silencieusement → entrées 30min/6h cached 12h → no-mapping poisoning. Fix: apiCacheSet(key,data,source,ttlMs) honore désormais ttlMs param. (2) Sofa microservice obligatoire dans le chemin → si down → tv-channel renvoie [] → frontend silencieux. Fix: LEAGUE_TV_FALLBACK static mapping league_id×country → broadcasters fallback côté serveur (J1=DAZN Japan JP, Ligue1=Canal+ Foot FR, PL=Canal+ FR, La Liga/Serie A/Bundesliga=beIN SPORTS FR, UCL/UEL=Canal+ FR). (3) URLs logos Wikipedia Commons 400 anti-hotlink, logos-world.net 404. Fix: cdn.simpleicons.org/dazn/F8002E (testé 200) + onerror='this.outerHTML="📺"' frontend img. (4) Cache poisoning: cacheKey suffixe versioning v1→v2→v3 pour invalider stale entries. Frontend enrichTVChannels: stratégie 2-pays FR→JP per match, si les 2 vides pas de logo (politique user). Source vérité: server.js TV_CHANNEL_LOGOS + LEAGUE_TV_FALLBACK constants module-level.
